categories.name: Organic Emissive Stack & Device Architecture
reference_questions: Provide the complete layer stack from anode to cathode listing every layer, material, and thickness (nm).
What is the chemical structure or CAS number of the emissive material? Small molecule, polymer, or QD?
What is the external quantum efficiency (EQE %) and current efficiency (cd/A) at target brightness?
What OLED architecture — bottom emission, top emission, or transparent?
What is the operating voltage (V) at 1000 cd/m² and threshold voltage (V)?

categories.name: Flexible Substrate & Encapsulation
reference_questions: What flexible substrate material — PEN, PET, PI, ultra-thin glass? Provide thickness (µm) and Young's modulus (GPa).
What is the minimum bending radius (mm) for static and dynamic use?
Describe the encapsulation method and achieved WVTR (g/m²/day).
What deposition process for encapsulation — ALD, CVD, sputtering? Layer thickness and pinhole density?
How is CTE mismatch between substrate and organic layers managed?

categories.name: Drive Circuit & Power Efficiency
reference_questions: What TFT technology — a-Si, LTPS, IGZO, organic TFT? Provide mobility (cm²/Vs).
Describe pixel circuit topology — 2T1C, 4T2C? Provide schematic.
What is power efficiency (lm/W) at 300 cd/m² and 1000 cd/m²?
What drive waveform — current, voltage, or PWM? At what frequency?
Describe compensation scheme for OLED aging and TFT threshold shift.

categories.name: Lifetime, Degradation & Reliability
reference_questions: What is LT50 and LT95 lifetime (hours) at 1000 cd/m²?
What are the primary degradation mechanisms — intrinsic or extrinsic?
How does luminance non-uniformity (mura) develop over lifetime?
What burn-in behaviour after 500 hours at 50% APL?
